reason: Backend conventions: __future__ annotations, Mapped[] types, async-first, migration style, no repository pattern.
ORM model changes (ArticleSummary.lang) + new alembic migration 019 + UniqueConstraint alteration.
Forbidden patterns / code standards for router + service edits.
Frontend conventions: React Query + i18n (en/zh-CN) + hook patterns.
useSummarize / useArticle / useArticles mutation+query patterns and queryKey management for lang param.
React Query queryKey design — must include lang to re-fetch on UI language switch.
Feature spans DB model + backend router/service + frontend hooks/components + i18n; cross-layer data flow review.
